title: Inventory maternal mental health data
outcome: A dated source inventory separating screening data, treatment data, and workforce data.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.
done_condition: Four sources classified as usable, limited, or rejected.

title: Map maternal mental health detection and treatment gaps
outcome: A sub-national detection-treatment gap map with methodology documentation.
validation_method: Replicator reruns analysis with alternative data subsets and confirms gaps.
done_condition: Gap map with methodology and replication.

title: Red-team misuse of maternal mental health data
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying stigmatization and mandatory-screening risks.
validation_method: Mitigations confirmed or publication blocked, then replicated.

title: Check whether outputs match maternal health planning needs
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, misuse risk, replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases.
